action_set_definitions.name: get_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current sensor readings from the greenhouse environment including moisture, tank levels, and system clock.

action_set_definitions.name: set_pump_status
action_set_definitions.description: Changes the operational state of the irrigation pump. This action executes immediately in the current simulation step.

status.description: The desired state of the pump.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_simulation
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the environment simulation by a specified number of minutes. This allows the pump (if on) to affect soil moisture and consume water.

minutes.description: The amount of time to progress the simulation.

state_description.soil_moisture_percentage: The current percentage of moisture in the soil (0.0 to 100.0).
state_description.air_temperature_celsius: The ambient air temperature inside the greenhouse.
state_description.water_tank_liters: The current volume of water remaining in the irrigation tank.
state_description.pump_status: The current operational state of the irrigation pump ('on' or 'off').
state_description.elapsed_time_minutes: Total minutes elapsed since the start of the simulation session.
